_note: Observe-only DCL movement-route probe. It reads the movement actor immediately before each per-tile X/Y arrival commit. It performs no battle, coordinate, route, status, HP, MP, action, data, or save write.

LandmarkProbes.Name: dcl-movement-arrival-native-a
LandmarkProbes.Access: observe actor immediately before target X/Y becomes current X/Y

LandmarkProbes.Name: dcl-movement-arrival-native-b
LandmarkProbes.Access: observe alternate native actor arrival before target X/Y becomes current X/Y

LandmarkProbes.Name: dcl-movement-arrival-trace-a
LandmarkProbes.Access: observe trace-equivalent actor arrival before target X/Y becomes current X/Y
